Video.summary: Begin with an overview of the British Royal Navy at the time of US independence.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States Navy
Video.title: The British Origins of the US Navy

Image.alt: The British Origins of the US Navy
The British Origins of the US Navy
The British Origins of the US Navy

Video.summary: Take account of the three arms of sea power on the American side during the American Revolution.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States Navy
Video.title: American Revolution on River, Lake, and Sea

Image.alt: American Revolution on River, Lake, and Sea
American Revolution on River, Lake, and Sea
American Revolution on River, Lake, and Sea

Video.summary: Trace the early days of establishing a standing US naval force the creation of the Department of the Navy.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States Navy
Video.title: Alexander Hamilton and the Early Navalists

Image.alt: Alexander Hamilton and the Early Navalists
Alexander Hamilton and the Early Navalists
Alexander Hamilton and the Early Navalists

Video.summary: Investigate the conflicts that led the US to declare war on Britain in 1812 and look at crucial battles.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States Navy
Video.title: British Blockade and the War of 1812

Image.alt: British Blockade and the War of 1812
British Blockade and the War of 1812
British Blockade and the War of 1812

Video.summary: This episode explains the sectional controversies and clashes that set the stage for secession and war.
Video.title: Prelude to War

Video.summary: The presidential canvas of 1860 resulted in Lincoln's election as the first Republican to win the White House.
Video.title: The Election of 1860

Video.summary: Study the process that established the Confederate States of America.
Video.title: The Lower South Secedes

Video.summary: Learn how the US-held Fort Sumter in Charleston Harbor became a flash point to begin war.
Video.title: The Crisis at Fort Sumter

Video.summary: Was the South fated to lose, as many people think?
Video.title: The Opposing Sides, I

Video.summary: Did the Confederacy have better generals? Which side had the edge in strategic and political leadership?
Video.title: The Opposing Sides, II

Video.summary: Why did young men join the colors of the North or the South?
Video.title: The Common Soldier

Video.summary: What was Gen. Winfield Scott's brilliant "Anaconda Plan" and other factors that lead to the first big clash.
Video.title: First Manassas or Bull Run

Video.summary: What can the Bible tell us about life in biblical Israel? What can archaeology tell us?
Video.title: Biblical Israel - The Story of a People

Image.alt: Biblical Israel - The Story of a People
Biblical Israel - The Story of a People
Biblical Israel - The Story of a People

Video.summary: Start your journey through biblical Israel with a look at the Babylonian exile.
Video.title: By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile

Image.alt: By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile
By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile
By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile

Video.summary: The freedom fight did not end for Black Americans when President Lincoln issued the Emancipation Proclamation.
Video.grandparentTitle: African American History: From Emancipation through Jim Crow
Video.title: Emancipation: The Fight for Rights Begins

Image.alt: Emancipation: The Fight for Rights Begins
Emancipation: The Fight for Rights Begins
Emancipation: The Fight for Rights Begins

Video.summary: As interpretations of Reconstruction tore things apart, far more sinister economic and social systems formed.
Video.grandparentTitle: African American History: From Emancipation through Jim Crow
Video.title: The Promise and Betrayal of Reconstruction

Image.alt: The Promise and Betrayal of Reconstruction
The Promise and Betrayal of Reconstruction
The Promise and Betrayal of Reconstruction

Video.summary: How was the 'separate but equal' doctrine legitimized and enforced in the United States?
Video.grandparentTitle: African American History: From Emancipation through Jim Crow
Video.title: Separate and Unequal: The Rise of Jim Crow

Image.alt: Separate and Unequal: The Rise of Jim Crow
Separate and Unequal: The Rise of Jim Crow
Separate and Unequal: The Rise of Jim Crow

Video.summary: Discover how Black communities insulated themselves from the harsh realities of the early 20th century.
Video.grandparentTitle: African American History: From Emancipation through Jim Crow
Video.title: Lift Every Voice and Sing

Video.summary: Discovery of a New World allowed Europeans to write new scripts for their lives.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States, 2nd Edition
Video.title: Living Bravely

Video.summary: The French attempted to settle in America, but did not succeed as the Spanish had.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States, 2nd Edition
Video.title: Spain, France, and the Netherlands

Video.summary: The English joined the game of extraction and settlement last of all the major European nations.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States, 2nd Edition
Video.title: Gentlemen in the Wilderness

Video.summary: Southern English colonies were motivated by economic self-interest; northern ones by ideas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States, 2nd Edition
Video.title: Radicals in the Wilderness

Video.summary: Survey the stories of ancient Israel's origins as preserved in Genesis.
Video.title: Ancestor Narratives in Genesis

Video.summary: Take a closer look at Moses and the story of the Israelites' exodus from Egypt.
Video.title: Moses - The Torah's Central Hero

Video.summary: Turn now to the emergence of Israel as a nation, detailed in Joshua and Judges.
Video.title: Becoming the Nation of Israel

Video.summary: How did people live? What did they cook with? How did they divide their labor?
Video.title: Kinship and Economics in Highland Villages

Image.alt: Kinship and Economics in Highland Villages
Kinship and Economics in Highland Villages
Kinship and Economics in Highland Villages

Video.summary: In this episode, Professor Chapman focuses on several biblical relationships.
Video.title: Three Weddings and a Funeral

Video.summary: Investigate models of leadership that offer insight into ancient Israel's structures of power.
Video.title: Political Power Bases in Early Israel

Image.alt: Political Power Bases in Early Israel
Political Power Bases in Early Israel
Political Power Bases in Early Israel

Video.summary: Explore various settlements along the coast between the Chesapeake and Long Island.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States, 2nd Edition
Video.title: Traders in the Wilderness

Video.summary: Commercial success would have been impossible without cheap labor and slaves.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States, 2nd Edition
Video.title: An Economy of Slaves

Video.summary: Americans developed cultural forms in both music and art that were uniquely American.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States, 2nd Edition
Video.title: Printers, Painters, and Preachers

Video.summary: The stresses of Colonial life produced social eruptions aimed at regaining a sense of control.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States, 2nd Edition
Video.title: The Great Awakening

Video.summary: Take a peek at the region's earliest recorded inhabitants, the Canaanites.
Video.title: The Land of Canaan

Video.summary: What have archaeologists uncovered about the arrival of the Israelites into Canaan?
Video.title: The Arrival of the Israelites

Video.summary: Survey the topography and layout of perhaps the most important city in religious history.
Video.title: Jerusalem - An Introduction to the City

Image.alt: Jerusalem - An Introduction to the City
Jerusalem - An Introduction to the City
Jerusalem - An Introduction to the City

Video.summary: Grasp the development of biblical Hebrew script, and examine rare examples.
Video.title: The Jerusalem of David and Solomon

Image.alt: The Jerusalem of David and Solomon
The Jerusalem of David and Solomon
The Jerusalem of David and Solomon

Video.summary: Learn about the three different water systems that were created for the City of David.
Video.title: Biblical Jerusalem's Ancient Water Systems

Video.summary: Turn to Israel as it was ruled between Solomon's death and the Assyrian invasion in 722 B.C.E.
Video.title: Samaria and the Northern Kingdom of Israel

Image.alt: Samaria and the Northern Kingdom of Israel
Samaria and the Northern Kingdom of Israel
Samaria and the Northern Kingdom of Israel

Video.summary: Delve into aspects of everyday life in the kingdoms of ancient Israel.
Video.title: Fortifications and Cult Practices

Video.summary: Take a look at Persian administration of the Holy Land and the birth of Judaism.
Video.title: Babylonian Exile and the Persian Restoration

Image.alt: Babylonian Exile and the Persian Restoration
Babylonian Exile and the Persian Restoration
Babylonian Exile and the Persian Restoration
